response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with geospatial data through GISCollective, but lacks direct experience with C++/Rust in production routing/tiling systems. The resume shows adaptability and problem-solving but requires deeper alignment with the core technical requirements of the role.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions in the domain.
Proven ability to build scalable, distributed systems (e.g., micro-services at Sociomantic, event-driven platforms).
Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on experimentation and data-driven approaches (e.g., workshops, TDD).
concerns: Primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, with limited recent C++/Rust experience in commercial routing/tiling contexts.
No explicit mention of navigation systems, routing algorithms, or real-time traffic integration in past roles.
Geospatial experience is more NGO-focused (Green Map) rather than high-scale commercial routing pipelines.
